boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: unapproved clause fallback.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Boundary not closed by current source records
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Open dependency blocks execution under control record
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current legal redline approval and clause version match unresolved

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record explicitly states the required dependency remains open: current legal redline approval and clause version match is unresolved. The policy requires exact source-record closure before execution. Communication pressure cannot override control records. The action boundary remains blocked until the dependency is resolved by current legal authority.
open_blockers: current legal redline approval and clause version match
